The '''Thalassian system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Meram sector/Legends|Meram sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] which contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thalassia/Legends|Thalassia]].

{{System-stub}}
